About Python¶

This tutorial assumes that the reader is familiar with the Python language and does not address Python’s basic syntax. The following tutorials have good reputation:

  • http://diveintopython.org/
  • http://www.greenteapress.com/thinkpython/html/index.html
  • http://learnpythonthehardway.org/index
  • http://www.swaroopch.com/notes/Python

and of course, the tutorial from Guido van Rossum, the creator of Python:

  • http://docs.python.org/tutorial/

Contents:¶

  • Hints and tips
    • Data types
    • Annoying features
    • References
    • Testing None
    • Exceptions
  • Object Orientation
    • Encapsulation and related topics
    • Inheritance and related topics
    • Polymorhpism and related topics
  • Modules and packages
    • Modules
    • Packages
  • Programming techniques
    • Function and method arguments
    • Callable objects
    • Recursivity
